ETC-693.title: Detach Functionality for Components
ETC-693.description:
There has been the request for the possibility to detach components. Meaning to kind of use the components as a pattern. (The AC should clear things up)


![image.png](https://uploads.linear.app/48a03f57-ea0e-4dba-b596-2bf09659f4d1/b90914a4-1b33-4c3a-952d-1c4e26fa4397/46a129d6-3e3b-4868-b0e1-573f0ad47758)



AC:

* On the component instance the user can see a "Detach Component" Button
* Clicking the button clones the blocks from within the component and replaces the component instance with the cloned blocks (= detaches it from the shared component definition)

ETC-651.title: Add Components Dynamic Data in Components
ETC-651.description:
Context: It would be nice to have access to infos about the component while in the component.
We could enqueue this under the `component` key.

Proposed syntax:

```
{
  "id": 12,
  "name": "My Awesome Component",
  "key": "MyAwesomeComponent",
  "properties": [
    {
      "type": "text",
      "default": "Hello i am a text",
      "key": "ctaText"
    }
  ]
}
```

AC:

* The user can use `component.[smth]` to access metadata of the component
* He can put it in curly braces (as any other dynamic data) to utilise it in the html editor
* The component namespace is only accessible in the component itself
* Any data will be output in the canvas/frontend/gutenberg

ETC-640.title: Ability to add description to component props
ETC-640.description:
### 🔖 Summary

Users would find it helpful to provide description to each component prop. This would be especially helpful for 3rd party Component creators.

![image.png](https://uploads.linear.app/48a03f57-ea0e-4dba-b596-2bf09659f4d1/1f66cca6-8162-4125-816c-56c427c75c08/68b681da-d078-4a88-ac8e-ae1546773c76)

### 📗 Acceptance Criteria

* Users can add a description to each component prop when they are inside the component editor
* Users can see the `info icon` that shows once the description is filled in
* User has a way of editing or deleting the description

ETC-687.title: Group Prop Adjustments
ETC-687.description:
- [X] Remove Group Prop Icon
- [X] Increase the padding-left to 8px
- [X] Group Prop Wrapper - increase the padding to 4px
- [X] Group Prop Wrapper - increase the gap to 4px

![CleanShot 2026-04-21 at 16.56.03.png](https://uploads.linear.app/48a03f57-ea0e-4dba-b596-2bf09659f4d1/484ad753-0cd6-43b6-93aa-25f91a37a18b/dc9363a5-40ed-45f4-941d-9400acfb96b1)

ETC-688.title: Condition Prop Adjustments
ETC-688.description:
- [X] Remove condition prop icon
- [X] Increase the left-padding to 8px
- [X] Prepend the Condition value with un-selectable `{if}` statement
- [X] Show the condition expression below the condition prop label (remove popover window input)
- [X] Increase the condition wrapper padding to 4px (same like with group prop wrapper)
- [X] Increase the condition wrapper gap to 4px

![CleanShot 2026-04-21 at 17.19.35.png](https://uploads.linear.app/48a03f57-ea0e-4dba-b596-2bf09659f4d1/66389b1e-7284-493a-8fc1-8e3c1cee5708/f54cd984-777a-4b79-a6fd-1a18b7fea3c2)

ETC-690.title: Right-click menu Adjustments
ETC-690.description:
- [X] re-introduce the colorized options for a certain actions in a right-click menu
- [X] add “wrap in” options in right click menu (div / loop / condition and then the rest)

ETC-689.title: "Create Component" icon needs more visibility
ETC-689.description:
On the element's settings panel:

* change the "create component" icon from stroke one to a solid one
* change the "create component" icon color (in the element's settings panel) to purple

![CleanShot 2026-04-21 at 16.44.57.png](https://uploads.linear.app/48a03f57-ea0e-4dba-b596-2bf09659f4d1/1aefe1db-8213-4b68-a7b3-6ca82729eb9a/62d0932d-f0ab-411e-8658-9001815f010f)

ETC-680.title: Redesign Group Prop Input
ETC-680.description:
### 🔖 Summary

Implement new small UI changes for component's `Group Prop` input.

![image.png](https://uploads.linear.app/48a03f57-ea0e-4dba-b596-2bf09659f4d1/a58c3161-6896-43ef-bff9-50135f84101f/a22bd778-e3f3-4355-b33f-3efe79786fe8)

### 📗 Acceptance Criteria

* User can see a default empty state after adding a group prop
* User can remove the group prop
* User can add new items inside the group prop
* User can make a group prop repeatable as soon as there is at least 1 property added
* User can collapse/expand a group prop
* The user can see `Group Prop Icon` when previewing component instance
* There is a clear indication of what should happen with the `Group prop label` grows too long
* Adding new items in the group prop on component instance adhere to the Figma design
* User can reorder the items in the repeater instance

ETC-635.title: Redesign Media Prop Input
ETC-635.description:
### 🔖 Summary

Implement vertically stacked layout and other small UI changes for component's `Media Prop` input.

### 

![image.png](https://uploads.linear.app/48a03f57-ea0e-4dba-b596-2bf09659f4d1/fca53922-dd62-4d88-8055-4888b69d7063/fefa676a-8eb6-4f82-a622-b2962ad3d742)

### 📗 Acceptance Criteria

* The user can see vertically stacked layout for the `Media prop` input in both the component editor mode and when previewing the component instance.
* The user can see `Media Prop Icon` when previewing component instance
* There is a clear indication of what should happen with the `Media prop label` grows too long
* There is a clear indication of what should happen with the `Media prop value` grows too long
* The user should see a thumbnail placeholder instead of the "Edit icon" inside the component editor
